channel.title: GitHub Scala Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Scala in GitHub

item.title: OpenXiangShan/XiangShan
item.description: Open-source high-performance RISC-V processor

item.title: delta-io/delta
item.description: An open-source storage framework that enables building a Lakehouse architecture with compute engines including Spark, PrestoDB, Flink, Trino, and Hive and APIs

item.title: apache/incubator-gluten
item.description: Gluten is a middle layer responsible for offloading JVM-based SQL engines' execution to native engines.

item.title: twitter/the-algorithm
item.description: Source code for Twitter's Recommendation Algorithm

item.title: apache/spark
item.description: Apache Spark - A unified analytics engine for large-scale data processing

item.title: open-korean-text/open-korean-text
item.description: Open Korean Text Processor - An Open-source Korean Text Processor

item.title: JohnSnowLabs/spark-nlp
item.description: State of the Art Natural Language Processing

item.title: lynxworld/lynx
item.description: Cypher query execution framework

item.title: sbt/sbt
item.description: sbt, the interactive build tool

item.title: digital-asset/daml
item.description: The Daml smart contract language

item.title: chipsalliance/chisel
item.description: Chisel: A Modern Hardware Design Language

item.title: awslabs/deequ
item.description: Deequ is a library built on top of Apache Spark for defining "unit tests for data", which measure data quality in large datasets.

item.title: ucb-bar/chipyard
item.description: An Agile RISC-V SoC Design Framework with in-order cores, out-of-order cores, accelerators, and more

item.title: delta-io/delta-sharing
item.description: An open protocol for secure data sharing

item.title: databricks/Spark-The-Definitive-Guide
item.description: Spark: The Definitive Guide's Code Repository

item.title: NVIDIA/spark-rapids
item.description: Spark RAPIDS plugin - accelerate Apache Spark with GPUs

item.title: yahoo/CMAK
item.description: CMAK is a tool for managing Apache Kafka clusters

item.title: zio/zio
item.description: ZIO — A type-safe, composable library for async and concurrent programming in Scala

item.title: playframework/playframework
item.description: The Community Maintained High Velocity Web Framework For Java and Scala.

item.title: nightscape/spark-excel
item.description: A Spark plugin for reading and writing Excel files

item.title: databrickslabs/remorph
item.description: Accelerates migrations to Databricks by automating code conversion and migration validation
